name: Weekly Email Scan Sep Khanh - 21h T7

payload.message:
QUET EMAIL TUAN CUA SEP KHANH — 21H T7 HANG TUAN.

MUC DICH: Tom tat tat ca email QUAN TRONG ma Sep nhan duoc trong tuan (T2-T7), de Sep nhin lai ca tuan, biet con email nao chua xu ly.

QUY TAC:
1. CHI quet email gui TRUC TIEP cho dhk@nsca.vn (to: dhk@nsca.vn). KHONG quan tam CC.
2. Filter 7 ngay (168h): `exec: node /app/google-tools/gmail-read.js 168 100 "to:dhk@nsca.vn -cc:dhk@nsca.vn"`
3. Phan loai 4 nhom:
   - 🔴 KHAN/CHUA tra loi: Email co tu 'urgent', 'gap', deadline, hoac chua co response
   - 📋 NOI BO: Tu @nsca.vn (BP, NPP)
   - 🌐 NGOAI: Khach hang, doi tac, OEM
   - 💼 DOI TAC QUOC TE: Tu nuoc ngoai (santiago@, OEM nuoc ngoai)
4. Giao Gemini tom tat (FREE):
   `node /app/google-tools/gemini-write.js "Tom tat email tuan cho CEO theo 4 nhom (urgent/noi bo/ngoai/quoc te). Moi email 1 dong: [nguoi gui] - [tom tat 1 cau]. Ket thuc: liet ke email QUAN TRONG chua co tra loi." 4000`
5. Tao Google Doc:
   `exec: node /app/google-tools/gdoc-create.js "Tom tat email tuan [XX] - [DD/MM]" "<content Gemini>"`
6. Gui email Sep + 1 tin Zalo:
   - Email: `exec: node /app/google-tools/gmail-send.js "dhk@nsca.vn" "[Le Na] Tom tat email tuan [XX]" "<HTML voi tom tat + link Doc + chu ky Le Na>" ""`
   - Zalo: `exec: openclaw message send --channel zalouser --target 255067431607136002 --message "📧 EMAIL TUAN [XX]\n🔴 Khan/chua tra loi: N\n📋 Noi bo: M | 🌐 Ngoai: K | 💼 Quoc te: L\n📄 Chi tiet: <link Doc>"`

KHONG phan tich chien luoc, KHONG de xuat. Chi tom tat thong ke.

QUET BAO CAO TUAN — 21H THU 7 HANG TUAN.

LUU Y: CHI 11 BP can nop bao cao tuan TRUC TIEP. BO (tamntt@), BD Noi dia (ducdd@), BD Intl (santiago@) bao cao cho PKD (ndao@) → KHONG nhac 3 BP nay.

BUOC 1: Quet email bao cao tu 11 BP trong 7 ngay qua:
`node /app/google-tools/gmail-read.js 168 50 "from:nsca.vn subject:(bao cao OR report OR weekly OR tuan)"`

BUOC 2: Doi chieu voi 11 BP can nop:
- R&D (namph@), HCNS (sondt@), PKD (ndao@), TCKT (duannt@), SX Nhom (ngocnv@), SX Thep (tunghm@), Co Dien (phongdv@), QAQC (tuannl@), Kho (hant@), Giao Hang (ducvt@), Cung Ung (anhdtk@)

BUOC 3: Ghi ket qua vao sheet 'Report Tracker'.

BUOC 4: CHI GUI 1 TIN ZALO DUY NHAT cho Sep Khanh:
   📊 BAO CAO TUAN [tuan XX]
   Da nop: N/11 BP
   Chua nop: [ten cac BP]
   Se nhac luc 21h CN neu van con thieu.

KHONG phan tich, KHONG de xuat chien luoc, CHI thong ke.

NHAC NHO BC TUAN — 21H CN.

LUU Y: CHI nhac trong 11 BP. KHONG nhac BO/BD Noi dia/BD Intl (ho bao cao cho PKD).

BUOC 1: Doc sheet 'Report Tracker' xem BP nao trong 11 BP CHUA NOP tuan nay.
11 BP: R&D (namph@), HCNS (sondt@), PKD (ndao@), TCKT (duannt@), SX Nhom (ngocnv@), SX Thep (tunghm@), Co Dien (phongdv@), QAQC (tuannl@), Kho (hant@), Giao Hang (ducvt@), Cung Ung (anhdtk@).

BUOC 2: Neu CO BP chua nop:
- Gui 1 EMAIL DUY NHAT (KHONG phai nhieu email):
  - To: danh sach email BP chua nop (gop CSV trong tham so to)
  - Cc: dhk@nsca.vn
  - Subject: '[NHAC] Nop bao cao tuan [XX] truoc 8h T2'
  - Body: Danh sach BP chua nop + deadline 8h T2
- Lenh: `node /app/google-tools/gmail-send.js "email1,email2,email3" "[NHAC] Nop bao cao tuan XX" "<body HTML co chu ky Le Na>" "dhk@nsca.vn"`

BUOC 3: 1 tin Zalo bao cao Sep:
   📋 NHAC BC: N BP chua nop. Da gui email.

Neu TAT CA 11 BP da nop → gui Zalo: '✅ 11/11 BP da nop BC tuan. Khong can nhac.'

name: Weekly Business Report - 8h T2 (ca nhan hoa 14 BP + tong hop Sep)

payload.message:
BAO CAO TUAN T2 8H — CA NHAN HOA 14 BP + TONG HOP SEP. BUOC 1: XAC DINH NGAY (BAT BUOC chay date): `exec: date "+%A %d/%m/%Y %H:%M"` Verify: hom nay PHAI la T2 (Mon). Neu khong → EXIT. BUOC 2: LAY BIEN BAN HOP GIAO BAN TUAN TRUOC tu sondt@nsca.vn: `exec: node /app/google-tools/gmail-read.js 192 5 "from:sondt@nsca.vn subject:(bien ban OR giao ban OR meeting OR minutes)"` - Tim email gan nhat trong 8 ngay tu sondt@ → do la bien ban hop T2 truoc (gui 17h T2 truoc) - Neu CO bien ban → tiep BUOC 3 - Neu KHONG CO bien ban → CHI gui 1 EMAIL nhac anh Son + 1 Zalo cho Sep, RoI EXIT: Email: `node /app/google-tools/gmail-send.js "sondt@nsca.vn" "[Le Na] Xin bien ban hop giao ban T2 tuan truoc" "

Kinh anh Son,

Em chua nhan duoc bien ban hop giao ban T2 tuan truoc. Anh vui long gui giup em de em tong hop bao cao cho Sep a. Cam on anh.

" "dhk@nsca.vn"` Zalo: `exec: openclaw message send --channel zalouser --target 255067431607136002 --message "⚠️ Chua co bien ban hop giao ban tuan truoc (sondt@). Em da gui email xin anh Son. Cho phan hoi roi tong hop tiep."` BUOC 3: DOC 11 BAO CAO TUAN cua 11 BP (KHONG 14): LUU Y: PKD da bao gom BO + BD Noi dia + BD Intl → CHI doc 11 email gui truc tiep. 11 BP: R&D (namph@), HCNS (sondt@), PKD (ndao@), TCKT (duannt@), SX Nhom (ngocnv@), SX Thep (tunghm@), Co Dien (phongdv@), QAQC (tuannl@), Kho (hant@), Giao Hang (ducvt@), Cung Ung (anhdtk@). `exec: node /app/google-tools/gmail-read.js 168 5 "from:namph@nsca.vn subject:(bao cao OR report OR tuan)"` (R&D) ... lap lai cho 11 BP voi email tuong ung BUOC 4: VOI MOI BP (trong 11 BP) — phan tich va gui email CA NHAN HOA: Voi tung BP (R&D, HCNS, PKD, TCKT, SX Nhom, SX Thep, Co Dien, QAQC, Kho, Giao Hang, Cung Ung): a) Trich phan lien quan BP do tu BIEN BAN HOP (cong viec da giao tuan truoc cho BP nay) b) Trich BAO CAO TUAN cua BP (ket qua thuc te) c) Giao Gemini phan tich (mien phi): `node /app/google-tools/gemini-write.js "Phan tich cho [Ten BP - Truong BP]:\n[1] CONG VIEC DA GIAO tuan truoc trich tu bien ban hop:\n\n[2] KET QUA THUC TE tu bao cao tuan:\n\n[3] Yeu cau: Danh gia muc do hoan thanh tung viec (% va trang thai), phan tich yeu to tac dong (tot/xau), de xuat 3-5 bien phap cu the de cai thien tuan toi. Viet trang trong, dau dong, ngan gon. Xung em, goi anh/chi." 4000` d) Soan email HTML voi loi chao + noi dung Gemini + chu ky Le Na e) Gui email RIENG cho BP do (TO: email truong BP, CC: dhk@nsca.vn): `exec: node /app/google-tools/gmail-send.js "" "[Le Na] Phan tich va de xuat tuan [XX] - " "" "dhk@nsca.vn"` BUOC 5: TAO BAO CAO TONG HOP cho Sep Khanh: a) Giao Gemini tong hop: `node /app/google-tools/gemini-write.js "Tong hop bao cao 11 BP NSCA tuan [XX]:\n<11 phan tich tu BUOC 4>\n\nViet 1 BAO CAO HOP GIAO BAN cho CEO:\n[1] Tong quan tuan: doanh thu, san xuat, su kien chinh\n[2] Ket qua tung BP (1 dong moi BP, traffic light xanh/vang/do)\n[3] Top 3 BP tot - Top 3 BP can chu y\n[4] Van de can quyet dinh\n[5] Uu tien tuan moi (3-5 dau viec)\nDinh dang ro rang, dau dong, dam." 8000` b) Tao Google Doc: `exec: node /app/google-tools/gdoc-create.js "Bao cao Hop Giao ban Tuan [XX] - [DD/MM]" ""` c) Gui email Sep + chi Hong (CC): `exec: node /app/google-tools/gmail-send.js "dhk@nsca.vn" "[Le Na] Tai lieu Hop Giao ban T2 - Tuan [XX]" "" "nsca@nsca.vn"` BUOC 6: 1 TIN ZALO DUY NHAT cho Sep: `exec: openclaw message send --channel zalouser --target 255067431607136002 --message "📊 BAO CAO TUAN [XX] (T2 8h)\n✅ Da gui email ca nhan hoa cho 14 BP\n📈 Top tot: [BP1, BP2, BP3]\n⚠️ Can chu y: [BP4, BP5, BP6]\n📄 Tai lieu hop: \n⏰ San sang hop giao ban"` BUOC 7: KET THUC. KHONG gui them tin nhan/email nao. KHONG hoi Sep co can gi them. LUU Y QUAN TRONG: - TONG: 11 email ca nhan hoa + 1 email Sep + 1 Zalo Sep = 13 email/tin (KHONG hon) - KHONG gui email cho BO/BD Noi dia/BD Intl rieng (ho thuoc PKD) - KHONG gui email cho cung 1 nguoi 2 lan - Neu 1 BP chua nop bao cao tuan → trong email phan tich BP do, ghi: "Em chua nhan duoc bao cao tuan cua [Ten BP]. Anh/chi vui long gui de em tong hop ky sau." - KHONG bia so lieu. Neu khong co data → noi ro "chua co data". - Email gui voi than phan LE NA, ky ten Le Na (KHONG ky ten Sep).

name: Check bien ban hop T2 (8h T3)

payload.message:
KIEM TRA BIEN BAN HOP GIAO BAN T2 — 8H T3. MUC DICH: Bien ban hop giao ban T2 phai duoc anh Son (sondt@nsca.vn) gui truoc 17h T2. Sang T3 8h kiem tra. BUOC 1: Quet email tu sondt@ trong 24h qua: `exec: node /app/google-tools/gmail-read.js 24 5 "from:sondt@nsca.vn subject:(bien ban OR giao ban OR meeting OR minutes)"` BUOC 2: - Neu CO email bien ban → KHONG GUI GI. Im lang. EXIT. - Neu KHONG CO bien ban → Gui 1 EMAIL nhac anh Son: `exec: node /app/google-tools/gmail-send.js "sondt@nsca.vn" "[Le Na] Xin bien ban hop giao ban T2 hom qua" "

Kinh anh Son,

Em chua nhan duoc bien ban hop giao ban T2 hom qua (du kien gui 17h T2). Anh vui long gui giup em de em tong hop ke hoach tuan cho cac BP. Cam on anh.

" "dhk@nsca.vn"` + 1 Zalo cho Sep: `exec: openclaw message send --channel zalouser --target 255067431607136002 --message "⚠️ Chua co bien ban hop T2 hom qua. Da gui email xin anh Son."` KHONG gui them gi khac. EXIT.

name: Daily NPP Scan - 9h sang (cho anh Ngoc TP KD)

payload.message:
QUET DON HANG NPP NOI DIA — 9H SANG (cho anh Ngoc Boc beo - TP KD).

BUOC 1: Doc workflow chi tiet: cat /root/.openclaw/workspace/memory/workflow-anh-ngoc-pkd.md

BUOC 2: Quet don hang 24h qua tu 5 NPP:
`exec: node /app/google-tools/npp-order-log.js 24`

BUOC 3: Doc ket qua JSON.
- Neu CO don hang moi → tom tat NGAN gon, gui 1 tin Zalo cho anh Ngoc:
  📦 NPP MOI (ngay [DD/MM])
  • [NPP A]: [SP] x [SL] = [gia tri]
  • [NPP B]: ...
  Tong: X don, Y trieu
- Neu KHONG co → KHONG GUI gi (khong spam).

BUOC 4: Tim Zalo ID anh Ngoc neu chua co:
`exec: openclaw channels resolve --channel zalouser --json "0902115796"`
Luu ID vao memory/contacts.md neu lay duoc.

Gui Zalo: `exec: openclaw message send --channel zalouser --target <zalo_id_anh_ngoc> --message "<noi dung>"`

KHONG phan tich, KHONG de xuat chien luoc, CHI thong ke don hang.

name: Weekly PKD Team Report - 9h T2 (cho anh Ngoc - quan ly cap duoi)

payload.message:
BAO CAO TUAN PKD — 9H T2 cho anh Ngoc (Boc beo). MUC DICH: giup anh Ngoc QUAN LY 3 cap duoi + 5 NPP, lay du lieu de bao cao len CEO.

BUOC 1: Doc workflow: cat /root/.openclaw/workspace/memory/workflow-anh-ngoc-pkd.md

BUOC 2: Quet email bao cao tuan tu 3 CAP DUOI:
- `exec: node /app/google-tools/gmail-read.js 168 5 "from:ducdd@nsca.vn (bao cao OR report OR tuan OR weekly)"` (Đức - BD Noi dia)
- `exec: node /app/google-tools/gmail-read.js 168 5 "from:santiago@nsca.vn (report OR weekly)"` (Santiago - BD Quoc te, tieng Anh OK)
- `exec: node /app/google-tools/gmail-read.js 168 5 "from:tamntt@nsca.vn (bao cao OR report OR tuan)"` (chi Tâm - BO)

BUOC 3: Quet email anh Ngoc giao viec tuan truoc (de doi chieu):
`exec: node /app/google-tools/gmail-read.js 168 30 "from:ndao@nsca.vn (to:ducdd@nsca.vn OR to:santiago@nsca.vn OR to:tamntt@nsca.vn)"`

BUOC 4: Doc 4 sheet:
- NPP Tracker (tab 10), KHKD Baseline (tab 9), International Pipeline (tab 16), Activity Log (tab 8)

BUOC 5: Giao Gemini tong hop (FREE, 6000 tokens):
`node /app/google-tools/gemini-write.js "Tong hop bao cao tuan PKD cho TP Kinh doanh:\n[1] BD NOI DIA (Đức): cong viec da giao -> ket qua -> % hoan thanh + diem manh/yeu\n[2] BD QUOC TE (Santiago): pipeline quoc te, deal moi, % MIP target\n[3] BO (chi Tâm): don hang, cong no, logistics\n[4] 5 NPP NOI DIA: doanh so, % target, top/yeu\n[5] DE XUAT cho anh Ngoc: 3-5 viec can luu y de quan ly cap duoi tuan toi\n[6] GOI Y noi dung anh Ngoc bao cao len CEO.\nFormat dau dong, ngan, danh gia khach quan." 6000`

BUOC 6: Tao Google Doc + email anh Ngoc:
- Doc: `exec: node /app/google-tools/gdoc-create.js "PKD Team Report Tuan [XX] - [DD/MM]" "<content Gemini>"`
- Email: `exec: node /app/google-tools/gmail-send.js "ndao@nsca.vn" "[Le Na] PKD Team Report - Tuan [XX]" "<HTML voi tom tat + link Doc + chu ky Le Na>" ""` (KHONG CC Sep)

BUOC 7: 1 tin Zalo TOM TAT cho anh Ngoc (resolve ID lan dau qua SDT 0902115796):
`exec: openclaw message send --channel zalouser --target <zalo_id_anh_ngoc> --message "📊 PKD TUAN [XX] (T2 9h)\n👥 Đức: [tom tat 1 dong] | Santiago: [...] | chi Tâm: [...]\n📦 5 NPP: top [A], yeu [B]\n⚡ Can luu y: [3-5 viec tuan toi]\n📄 Chi tiet: <link Doc>"`

KHONG forward Sep Khanh, KHONG bao cao chien luoc cong ty (quyen Sep).

name: Monthly Closing Report - Ngay cuoi thang

payload.message:
BAO CAO THANG — NGAY KHOA SO (21h ngay cuoi thang).

KIEM TRA: Chi chay neu HOM NAY LA NGAY CUOI CUNG cua thang. Neu khong phai → exit.
`exec: date -d tomorrow +%d` (neu khong phai '01' → hom nay KHONG phai ngay cuoi thang → EXIT)

NOI DUNG BAO CAO:
1. Tong hop KQKD thang: doanh thu 10 nganh hang, san luong, chi phi (tu sheet KPI Tracker, NPP Tracker)
2. So sanh voi thang truoc (+/- %)
3. Danh gia dinh muc: dat/khong dat (xanh >=100%, vang >=80%, do <80%)
4. Cham KPI 14 BP dua tren bao cao tuan + KPI Tracker (A/B/C/D)
5. Phuong huong thang sau + Quy: 3-5 uu tien

CACH LAM:
- Doc sheets: KHKD Baseline, KPI Tracker, NPP Tracker, Weekly Performance
- Giao Gemini viet content: `node /app/google-tools/gemini-write.js "<prompt voi data>" 8000`
- Tao Google Doc: `node /app/google-tools/gdoc-create.js "Bao cao thang [MM/YYYY]" "<content>"`
- Export PDF: `node /app/google-tools/gdoc-export.js "<docId>" "pdf"`
- Gui email cho Sep (va chi Hong): attach PDF
- 1 TIN ZALO DUY NHAT tom tat:
   📊 BAO CAO THANG [MM]
   💰 DT: X ty (YY% KH)
   🏭 SX: Z ty (WW% KH)
   📋 KPI BP: A:N nguoi, B:M, C:K, D:L
   📄 Chi tiet + PDF: [link]
